methodology.order: alternating; Rspack first on odd iterations and Vite first on even iterations
methodology.cold_start: process spawn to first successful HTTP response; caches removed before each start
methodology.hmr: source write to browser-observed DOM update over the live dev-server connection
methodology.overlay: browser DOM inspection after introducing a JavaScript syntax error, then restoration
methodology.noise_band: maximum observed min-to-max spread of either control; conservative, local-machine only
methodology.stale_server_control: ephemeral port preflight plus a unique compiled marker for every server process; shutdown awaits process exit and port closure
